title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 633.027 - Developmentally disabled persons to be served
text:
633.027.  Developmentally disabled persons to be served. — Persons diagnosed as developmentally disabled as defined in 42 U.S.C. 6001, as amended, solely on the basis of a diagnosis of mental disorder or mental illness as defined in section 630.005 shall be served by appropriate agencies.
(L. 1990 H.B. 1383) 
Effective 1-01-91
